senses.gloss: spot of different color, sign of refinement

examples.text: إِنَّهَا بَقَرَةٌ لَّا ذَلُولٌ تُثِيرُ الْأَرْضَ وَلَا تَسْقِي الْحَرْثَ مُسَلَّمَةٌ لَّا شِيَةَ فِيهَا
examples.english: ’Tis a cow not made to comply to plough the earth or irrigate the field, but is untainted with no spot upon her.
